title: Shane Wright
extract:
Shane Wright (born January 5, 2004) is a Canadian professional ice hockey player who is a centre for  the Seattle Kraken of the National Hockey League (NHL). Despite being projected as the likely first overall pick leading up to the 2022 NHL entry draft, Wright was selected fourth overall by the Kraken.
Internationally, Wright won gold medals as a member of Canada's under-18 team at the 2021 World U18 Championships and junior team at the 2023 World Junior Championships.
